Package org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class ServiceRegistrationData

java.lang.Object
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.ServiceRegistrationData
public class ServiceRegistrationData extends Object
The registration data of a running service.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    author()
    Gets information about the developer(s) of the service class.
    String
    className()
    Gets the Java class, C++ library or Python module that contains the service.
    String
    description()
    Gets the full description of the service class.
    ServiceName
    name()
     
    int
    poolSize()
    Gets the maximum number of parallel threads assigned to the service.

    Gets an identification of who deployed the service.

    Gets the local time when the service was started.

  • Method Details

    • name

      public ServiceName name()

    • className

      public String className()
      Gets the Java class, C++ library or Python module that contains the service.
      Returns:
      the location of the service binary

    • startTime

      public LocalDateTime startTime()
      Gets the local time when the service was started.
      Returns:
      the start time of the service

    • startedBy

      public String startedBy()
      Gets an identification of who deployed the service.
      Returns:
      the author that deployed the service

    • poolSize

      public int poolSize()
      Gets the maximum number of parallel threads assigned to the service.
      Returns:
      the maximum number of parallel requests that the service can process

    • author

      public String author()
      Gets information about the developer(s) of the service class.

      It may contain the name, email, etc of the person or group that developed and released the service.

      Returns:
      the author(s) of the service

    • version

      public String version()
      Gets the version string of the deployed service class.
      Returns:
      the version of the service

    • description

      public String description()
      Gets the full description of the service class.

      It may contain information of what the service does, what input data types are supported, what output data types are returned, what errors are returned, if it needs extra configuration, etc.

      Returns:
      the description of the service.
